meaning: n.[生]组织适合性,组织相容性
examples: A successful graft or transplant requires a high degree of histocompatibility.
The results showed that HLC II film and HLC II sponge have good histocompatibility.
The molecular basis of histocompatibility is a set of transplantation proteins that decorate the surface of nearly all human cells.
The correlation is with the genes of what is known as the major histocompatibility complex (MHC).
Major Histocompatibility Complex, dendrites and microglia.
